prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, controlled pacing with deliberate cuts and extended holds.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Cool daylight falls from above onto two armoured soldiers crouched over a pale stone, glinting on steel helmets and the two small dice between them while the upper frame and the deep background fall into shadow; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
Two Roman soldiers in steel helmets and breastplates are crouched low on either side of a pale stone slab, hands extended toward two small dice set upon the stone; one wears a tan tunic, the other a blue and gold cloak. Above them the base of a wooden cross holds a robed figure's nailed feet, and a small inscription board hangs higher in shadow. Faint figures stand in the dim background at far left and far right. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — two soldiers crouched at the foot of the cross, two dice between them, nailed feet and inscription board above.

Cut to mid framing — the two soldiers facing each other across the pale stone.

Cut to close-up — the nearer soldier's weathered face beneath his steel helmet.

Cut to insert — the two dice set on the stone between their extended hands.

Cut to lower framing — the soldiers' weathered hands above the stone slab.

Cut to insert — the nailed feet at rest on the wooden cross-base above.

Cut to macro detail — dull light along the curve of a steel helmet.

Return to full composition — soldiers, dice, the cross-base and inscription above, dim figures beyond.

End hold on the two dice on the pale stone.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Cold, indifferent calm beneath a holy cost.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image
